'''Shocker Squadron''' was one of two [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] that was formed at the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Eclipse Station|base]] on [[Eclipse (Deep Core)/Legends|Eclipse]] to assist the [[Wild Knights]] and [[Kyp's Dozen]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Led by [[Rigard Matl]], the Shockers consisted of fifteen untested Jedi and non-Jedi pilots flying [[T-65XJ3 X-wing starfighter|XJ3 series X-wings]], and two [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|Skipray Blastboats]].

The Squadron fought in several engagements around the time that [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] was invaded by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], notably in destroying the blockade around [[Talfaglio]], and later in the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]]. During the failed defense of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] capital, the squadron lost the majority of its starfighters, and both its Skiprays.

After the battle, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] merged the depleted Shockers with [[Saber Squadron (Eclipse)|Saber Squadron]], the other of the Eclipse Squadrons, to form the infamous [[Twin Suns Squadron]] which would soon come under the command of [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]. When the Republic placed most of its experienced pilots in command of new Squadrons, it is possible that a new Shocker Squadron was created, and that this newer form of the Squadron was the Shocker Squadron that took part in later battles of the War.
